description: Learn how to obtain Devnet SOL for deploying programs on Solana using various methods including Solana CLI, web faucets, RPC providers, and community resources.
topic_summary: This video outlines multiple ways to acquire Devnet SOL for testing on Solana, including CLI requests [t=9:20], web faucets [t=13:12], RPC provider airdrops [t=18:48], proof of work faucets [t=28:15], and community Discord faucets [t=39:11]. It also provides a bonus tip on retrieving SOL from deployed programs [t=44:59].
